text: - f. (Division 21) Fire Protection All piping with a diameter 3/4' and larger, inclusive of fittings, valves, insulation, modeled at the correct orientation, location and size.  All sloped lines (including smaller diameter), back-flow preventers, fire pumps, and other devices, equipment and clearances as required by equipment and code.  In addition, all underground supply lines, FDC's, all branch lines and spr inkler heads should be included. Required access panels shall also be modeled.
